overall.description: Static first-person view of a medieval stone bedroom interior from a video game, featuring wooden furniture, candle sconces on walls, and a bed with green curtains, with no movement or action occurring throughout the clip.

wooden bed frame with yellow-gold bedding and pillows

simple wooden chair positioned in front of the table
lit candle sconce mounted on the left stone wall providing warm light
lit candle sconce mounted on the right wall
wooden chest of drawers with a candle on top against the right wall
heavy wooden door with iron bands and bars at the back right of the room

segments.scene_description: A static view of a medieval stone bedroom interior illuminated by candlelight. The room features a central bed with green curtains behind it, wooden furniture including a table and chair on the left and a dresser on the right, and an iron-banded door at the back. The camera remains completely stationary throughout, capturing the warm, atmospheric lighting of the game environment with no movement or changes occurring.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static, first-person perspective of a medieval stone bedroom that remains constant in its warm, candlelit atmosphere. It begins with a fixed view of the interior, centered on a bed draped with green curtains. The gaze extends across the room to encompass wooden furniture, including a table and chair to the left and a dresser to the right. The scene then settles on the iron-banded door at the back of the chamber, where the lighting remains steady and unchanging. Finally, the camera holds this singular, atmospheric composition without any shift in movement or environment.
